title: SilktouchSpawners
description: SilktouchSpawners is a Minecraft plugin designed to allow players to mine or grab spawners
body: ## **Ability to use Silktouch to grab spawners** ![Ability to use Silktouch to grab spawners](https://i.imgur.com/Ud8aFwK.gif) ## **Overview** SilktouchSpawners is a Minecraft plugin designed to allow players to mine and pick up mob spawners using the Silk Touch enchantment. This plugin adds a new level of depth and strategy to mob farming and spawner management. ## **Features** - Mine and collect mob spawners using the Silk Touch enchantment - Supports all mob spawners - Customizable lore and display name for mined spawners - One-time use items to pick up spawners - Integration with other plugins for protection and custom behavior ## **One time use custom items** ![One time use custom items](https://i.imgur.com/BgfaEQi.gif) ### **Grab Spawners with custom lore and model data on pickaxes** ![Grab Spawners with custom lore and model data on pickaxes](https://i.imgur.com/R0Wc7iW.gif) ## **Config** [![config.yml](https://img.shields.io/badge/config.yml-0072C6?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/Niko302/SilktouchSpawners/blob/master/src/main/resources/config.yml) ## **Commands** - **`/silktouchspawners give [amount]`** - Gives the specified player the specified amount of spawners. - **`/silktouchspawners givecustomitem [amount]`** - Gives the specified player the specified amount of custom items. - **`/silktouchspawners reloadconfig`** - Reloads the plugin configuration file. ## **Permissions** - **`silktouchspawners.mine.`** - Allows the player to mine and pick up spawners with Silk Touch. - **`silktouchspawners.mine.all`** - Allows the player to mine all types of spawners. - **`silktouchspawners.changespawners`** - Permission to allow changing spawner types with eggs. - **`silktouchspawners.give`** - Allows the player to use the give commands to distribute spawners and custom items. ## **My plugins:** [![Autoreplant](https://www.spigotmc.org/data/resource_icons/117/117106.jpg?1717442282)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/autoreplant-1-20.117106/) ### **[Autoreplant](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/autoreplant-1-20.117106/)** [![SilktouchSpawners](https://www.spigotmc.org/data/resource_icons/117/117535.jpg?1719166226)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/silktouchspawners-1-20.117535/) ### **[SilktouchSpawners](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/silktouchspawners-1-20.117535/)** ![SilktouchSpawners Stats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/SilktouchSpawners.svg) ## **Please report bugs before posting a negative review.** **Give me a** **⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐** **review if satisfied**
